inputs.label: Column Height
inputs.businessContext: Effective height of the lally column from base to top anchorage (unbraced length).

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective height of the lally column from base to top anchorage (unbraced length).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lally kolonun tabandan üst ankraja kadar etkin yüksekliği (desteklenmeyen uzunluk).
businessContext_i18n.de: Effektive Höhe der Stahlstütze von der Basis bis zur oberen Verankerung (knicklänge).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur effective de la colonne lally de la base à l'ancrage supérieur (longueur libre).
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura efectiva de la columna lally desde la base hasta el anclaje superior (longitud no arriostrada).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الارتفاع الفعال لعمود اللالي من القاعدة إلى التثبيت العلوي (الطول غير المدعم).

inputs.label: Outer Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Outer diameter of the steel pipe column.

businessContext_i18n.en: Outer diameter of the steel pipe column.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre extérieur du tube en acier de la colonne.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro exterior del tubo de acero de la columna.

inputs.label: Wall Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the steel pipe wall.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thickness of the steel pipe wall.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur de la paroi du tube en acier.
businessContext_i18n.es: Espesor de la pared del tubo de acero.

inputs.label: Steel Yield Strength
inputs.businessContext: Minimum guaranteed yield stress of the steel material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum guaranteed yield stress of the steel material.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çelik malzemenin minimum garanti edilen akma gerilmesi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Contrainte d'élasticité minimale garantie du matériau en acier.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión de fluencia mínima garantizada del material de acero.
businessContext_i18n.ar: أدنى إجهاد خضوع مضمون لمادة الفولاذ.

inputs.label: Effective Length Factor K
inputs.businessContext: Buckling length coefficient depending on end conditions (1.0 for pinned-pinned, 0.5 for fixed-fixed, 2.0 for fixed-free).

businessContext_i18n.en: Buckling length coefficient depending on end conditions (1.0 for pinned-pinned, 0.5 for fixed-fixed, 2.0 for fixed-free).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uç koşullarına bağlı burkulma uzunluğu katsayısı (1.0 mafsallı-mafsallı, 0.5 ankastre-ankastre, 2.0 ankastre-serbest).
businessContext_i18n.de: Knicklängenbeiwert abhängig von den Endbedingungen (1,0 für gelenkig-gelenkig, 0,5 für eingespannt-eingespannt, 2,0 für eingespannt-frei).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de longueur de flambement selon les conditions d'extrémité (1,0 pour articulé-articulé, 0,5 pour encastré-encastré, 2,0 pour encastré-libre).
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de longitud de pandeo según condiciones de extremo (1.0 para articulado-articulado, 0.5 para empotrado-empotrado, 2.0 para empotrado-libre).
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل طول الانبعاج حسب ظروف النهايات (1.0 لمفصل-مفصل، 0.5 لتثبيت-تثبيت، 2.0 لتثبيت-حر).

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Design safety factor to ensure TÜV-compliant structural reliability.

businessContext_i18n.en: Design safety factor to ensure TÜV-compliant structural reliability.
businessContext_i18n.tr: TÜV uyumlu yapısal güvenilirlik için tasarım güvenlik faktörü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Sicherheitsfaktor zur Gewährleistung der TÜV-konformen strukturellen Zuverlässigkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de sécurité de conception pour garantir une fiabilité structurelle conforme à la norme TÜV.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de seguridad de diseño para garantizar la fiabilidad estructural conforme a TÜV.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل الأمان التصميمي لضمان الموثوقية الهيكلية المتوافقة مع TÜV.

inputs.label: Young's Modulus
inputs.businessContext: Modulus of elasticity of the steel (typically 200,000 MPa for structural steel).

businessContext_i18n.en: Modulus of elasticity of the steel (typically 200,000 MPa for structural steel).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çeliğin elastisite modülü (yapısal çelik için tipik olarak 200.000 MPa).
businessContext_i18n.de: Elastizitätsmodul des Stahls (typischerweise 200.000 MPa für Baustahl).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Module d'élasticité de l'acier (généralement 200 000 MPa pour l'acier de construction).
businessContext_i18n.es: Módulo de elasticidad del acero (típicamente 200,000 MPa para acero estructural).
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل مرونة الفولاذ (عادة 200,000 ميجا باسكال للفولاذ الإنشائي).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
